text:
check 69: contradictory_min_max.

{"type": "integer", "minimum": 10, "maximum": 5}

that's a param where minimum > maximum. the model will try to satisfy both. it can't.

found in production MCP servers.

the most common version: minLength > maxLength.

{"type": "string", "minLength": 100, "maxLength": 50}

any string satisfying this schema cannot exist. the model knows the constraint. it can't satisfy it.

copy-paste errors from auto-generated schemas.

we check 69 things that can go wrong in an MCP schema.

some are style (wrong voice). some waste tokens (long descriptions). some are just broken (min > max).

pip install agent-friend — catches them all.
